title: Dialog Window
text: Dialog Window A dialog window is a modal, non-resizable window used to display forms as dialog boxes, which is typically used to display or retrieve a limited amount of information. It is defined by setting the window property Window Type to Dialog . Description When Window Type is set to Dialog , the following properties are automatically set, and cannot be modified: Property Value Resizable False No Form Scroll Bars True Modality & Attachment Modal, Attached Was this topic helpful?
